parameters.query:
SELECT me.id AS message_event_id, me.thread_id, me.contact_id, me.provider_status
FROM public.message_events me
WHERE me.channel = 'INSTAGRAM'
  AND me.provider = 'META'
  AND me.provider_message_id = {{ JSON.stringify($json.provider_message_id) }}
ORDER BY me.created_at DESC
LIMIT 1

WITH delivery_insert AS (
  INSERT INTO public.delivery_events (
    message_event_id,
    thread_id,
    channel,
    provider,
    provider_message_id,
    delivery_status,
    raw_payload,
    event_at
  )
  VALUES (
    {{ JSON.stringify($json.message_event_id) }}::uuid,
    {{ JSON.stringify($json.thread_id) }}::uuid,
    'INSTAGRAM',
    'META',
    {{ JSON.stringify($node["Parse Status Event"].json.provider_message_id) }},
    {{ JSON.stringify($node["Parse Status Event"].json.delivery_status) }},
    {{ JSON.stringify(JSON.stringify($node["Parse Status Event"].json.raw_payload || {})) }}::jsonb,
    {{ JSON.stringify($node["Parse Status Event"].json.event_at) }}::timestamptz
  )
  ON CONFLICT (channel, provider, provider_message_id, delivery_status) DO NOTHING
  RETURNING id
), message_update AS (
  UPDATE public.message_events me
     SET provider_status = {{ JSON.stringify($node["Parse Status Event"].json.delivery_status) }},
         processing_status = CASE WHEN {{ JSON.stringify($node["Parse Status Event"].json.delivery_status) }} = 'READ' THEN 'REPLIED' ELSE me.processing_status END
   WHERE me.id = {{ JSON.stringify($json.message_event_id) }}::uuid
   RETURNING me.id
)
SELECT {{ JSON.stringify($json.message_event_id) }}::uuid AS message_event_id
